title: Batch operations
subtitle: Apply one change across many sites at once — update announcements, branding, or channels for your whole fleet in a single action.
noSitesDesc: Provision or connect a site first.

actions.announcementDesc: Set the same announcement on every selected site
actions.channelCreateDesc: Inject the same upstream channel into each site
actions.channelToggleDesc: Enable / disable a channel by name across sites
actions.channelUpdateDesc: Change baseUrl / key / models for a named channel — rotate a key everywhere
actions.channelDeleteDesc: Remove a named channel from every selected site
actions.grantDesc: Inject a marketplace template as a channel into every site

announcementHint: Shown to end users on each site. Leave empty to clear.
brandingHint: Only the fields you fill are updated.
apiKeyHint: Sent over TLS, stored by each engine — never shown back.
channelToggleHint: Matches channels with this exact name on each site
matrixDesc: Every channel across every site — spot drift, find who's missing a channel or where a key is still enabled.
matrixEmptyDesc: No channels found across your sites yet.
updateMatchHint: Matches channels with this exact name on each site
updateFillHint: Fill only the fields you want to change — the rest stay as they are.
rotateKeyHint: Leave empty to keep each site's current key
deleteHint: Channels with this exact name will be removed from every selected site
deleteWarn: This permanently deletes the channel from each selected site. This cannot be undone.
confirmDelete: Delete channel "{name}" from {n} site(s)? This cannot be undone.
grantHint: Grant this marketplace template as a channel to every selected site
lifecycleNote: Lifecycle actions apply only to panel-provisioned sites; connected (external) sites are reported as skipped.
